model.description: Video generation model name. Supported values: `doubao-seedance-2.0` and `doubao-seedance-2.0-fast`.

prompt.description: Video content description. Required for text-to-video; optional for image-to-video or video-reference-to-video.

image_urls.description: Image URL array for image-to-video. Cannot be used together with `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 9 reference images.

image_with_roles.description: Image array with roles, supporting first-frame and last-frame control.

role.description: Image role. `first_frame` sets the starting frame and `last_frame` sets the ending frame.

video_urls.description: Reference video URL array. Requires publicly accessible video URLs. Unavailable when using `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 3 reference videos, with total duration 15 seconds or less. Reference video resolution must be between 480P and 720P, and videos must not contain real people.

audio_urls.description: Reference audio URL array. Requires publicly accessible audio URLs. Unavailable when using `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 3 reference audio files, with total duration 15 seconds or less. Reference audio must be used together with reference images or reference videos.

tools.description: Tool list for enhanced capabilities such as web search.

seed.description: Random seed for controlling generation randomness.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the output video.

return_last_frame.description: Whether to return the last frame image for continuous video workflows.

examplePayload.prompt: A cinematic aerial shot sweeping over a neon-lit city at night with light rain and reflective streets.

model.description: Video generation model name. Supported values: `doubao-seedance-2.0` and `doubao-seedance-2.0-fast`.

prompt.description: Video content description. Required for text-to-video; optional for image-to-video or video-reference-to-video.

image_urls.description: Image URL array for image-to-video. Cannot be used together with `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 9 reference images.

image_with_roles.description: Image array with roles, supporting first-frame and last-frame control.

role.description: Image role. `first_frame` sets the starting frame and `last_frame` sets the ending frame.

video_urls.description: Reference video URL array. Requires publicly accessible video URLs. Unavailable when using `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 3 reference videos, with total duration 15 seconds or less. Reference video resolution must be between 480P and 720P, and videos must not contain real people.

audio_urls.description: Reference audio URL array. Requires publicly accessible audio URLs. Unavailable when using `image_with_roles`. Maximum of 3 reference audio files, with total duration 15 seconds or less. Reference audio must be used together with reference images or reference videos.

tools.description: Tool list for enhanced capabilities such as web search.

seed.description: Random seed for controlling generation randomness.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the output video.

return_last_frame.description: Whether to return the last frame image for continuous video workflows.

examplePayload.prompt: A city nightscape timelapse with dynamic traffic streaks and moody clouds moving quickly overhead.

model.description: Sora2 video generation model. This entry is pinned to `sora-2-pro`.

prompt.description: Required text prompt. Supports referencing created Sora roles with the `@username` syntax.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. `sora-2-pro` supports 10 seconds, 15 seconds, or 25 seconds.

image_urls.description: Reference image URL list for image-to-video. URLs must be publicly accessible. Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp. Maximum file size is 10MB.

watermark.description: Whether to add the official Sora watermark to the generated video.

thumbnail.description: Whether to generate a thumbnail. Thumbnail files are retained for about 1 hour.

private.description: Whether to enable private mode. Private videos cannot be published or remixed.

storyboard.description: Whether to enable storyboard mode for more detailed control.

character_url.description: Reference video URL for character reuse. Using this option reduces the generated video duration by 1 second.

character_timestamps.description: Character clip time range in the format `start,end`. Only a 2-second range is supported. Using this option reduces the generated video duration by 1 second.

examplePayload.prompt: A cinematic tracking shot of a red train crossing a snowy bridge at dusk, warm cabin lights glowing through the fog.

model.description: Sora2 video generation model. This entry is pinned to `sora-2-vip`.

prompt.description: Required text prompt. Supports referencing created Sora roles with the `@username` syntax.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. `sora-2-vip` supports 10 seconds or 15 seconds.

image_urls.description: Reference image URL list for image-to-video. URLs must be publicly accessible. Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp. Maximum file size is 10MB.

examplePayload.prompt: A quiet mountain lake at sunrise with thin mist drifting across the surface and birds circling above the trees.

model.description: Sora2 preview video generation model. This entry is pinned to `sora-2-preview`.

prompt.description: Required text prompt for video generation.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Only 4, 8, or 12 seconds are supported.

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. `square` is not supported.

image_urls.description: Reference image URL array for image-to-video. Only the first image is used. When a reference image is provided, APIMart auto-detects the image aspect ratio and overrides the `aspect_ratio` parameter. Maximum file size is 10MB. Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp.

examplePayload.prompt: A waterfall surges down dark rocks while sunlight cuts through the mist and forms a bright rainbow.

model.description: Sora2 preview video generation model. This entry is pinned to `sora-2-pro-preview`.

prompt.description: Required text prompt for video generation.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Only 4, 8, or 12 seconds are supported.

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. `square` is not supported.

resolution.description: Output resolution. This field is only supported by `sora-2-pro-preview`.

image_urls.description: Reference image URL array for image-to-video. Only the first image is used. When a reference image is provided, APIMart auto-detects the image aspect ratio and overrides the `aspect_ratio` parameter. Maximum file size is 10MB. Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp.

examplePayload.prompt: A lone astronaut walks through a flooded library lit by floating lanterns, with reflections shimmering on the water.
